summary: A Fox News 'Sunday Briefing' television segment with DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin on-screen and a chyron reading 'THE LAKEN RILEY ACT, DHS ARRESTS 17,500 ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS UNDER NEW LAW.' This is a cable-news interview.
notable_text: THE LAKEN RILEY ACT; DHS ARRESTS 17,500 ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS UNDER NEW LAW; TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN DHS ASSISTANT SEC FOR PUBLIC AFFAIRS; FOX NEWS Sunday Briefing
